nasb.text: The young lions have roared at him, They have roared loudly. And they have made his land a waste; His cities have been destroyed, without inhabitant.

esv.text: The lions have roared against him; they have roared loudly. They have made his land a waste; his cities are in ruins, without inhabitant.

cnv.text: 幼獅都向他咆哮， 大聲吼叫， 使他的地荒涼， 城中破毀，無人居住。

ccb.text: 敌人像狮子般向她咆哮吼叫， 使她的土地一片荒凉， 她的城邑一片废墟，杳无人烟。
